sql_array: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS test_table; CREATE TABLE test_table (id Int32, name String, value Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, name, partitionID(id, name), value FROM test_table WHERE name NOT LIKE 'C%' AND value IS NOT NULL ORDER BY id;
CREATE TABLE test_table2 (ref_id Int32, description String DEFAULT 'N/A', amount UInt64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY ref_id;
INSERT INTO test_table2 VALUES (1, 'Test A', 100), (2, NULL, 200), (3, 'Test C', 300), (4, 'Test D', 400);
SELECT t.id, t.name, t.value, t2.amount, partitionID(t.id, t.name) AS part_id FROM test_table t JOIN test_table2 t2 ON t.id NOT LIKE CAST(t2.ref_id AS String) ORDER BY part_id;
SELECT id, COUNT(*) AS count, partitionID(id) AS partition FROM test_table GROUP BY id HAVING count > 1;

WITH (SELECT MAX(value) AS max_value FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL) AS max_val SELECT name, partitionID(id) FROM test_table WHERE value NOT LIKE CAST(max_val AS String) ORDER BY partitionID(id);
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_test_table; CREATE TABLE temp_test_table (temp_id UUID, temp_description LowCardinality(String), temp_count Int32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY temp_id;
SELECT temp_id, temp_description, partitionID(temp_count), temp_count FROM temp_test_table WHERE temp_count NOT LIKE CAST(1 AS String) OR temp_count IS NULL;
